acceptance_targets: [booker_recap_loop] Pass if a reader can point to a distinct new stake in each of the three passages: lines around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:73 establish why Bea fled, lines around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:235 change the immediate risk, and lines around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:421 reveal at least one consequential fact or emotional pressure not already stated earlier. Fail if the revised chapter still repeats the same gala/photo grievance in all three scenes without a clear escalation.

[FBR-002] Pass if a cold read of the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6117 makes clear who knows Bea is alive, which adult has responsibility for the night, and what concrete return or pickup plan exists; fail if the chapter still ends with only a vague "I'm safe" message and no actionable guardian/contact arrangement.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader can point to a distinct new stake in each of the three passages: lines around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:73 establish why Bea fled, lines around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:235 change the immediate risk, and lines around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:421 reveal at least one consequential fact or emotional pressure not already stated earlier. Fail if the revised chapter still repeats the same gala/photo grievance in all three scenes without a clear escalation.
findings.problem: Bea's reason for running is explained three times in closely related terms: first in the flat, then in the cab, then again once Eszter has already taken her in. Each pass adds a little shading, but the third scene still spends precious pressure recapping the gala-photo grievance instead of turning that beat into a sharper new consequence or revelation. The chapter stays causally sound, yet the escalation softens just where Booker-level scene architecture should tighten.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the explanatory runs centered on snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:235, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:421 so each conversation does different work. Keep the flat scene focused on the immediate refusal, let the cab scene carry only the live panic around the parents' calls, and make the Eszter-room account surface a fresh consequential detail or harder emotional truth rather than another version of the same gala-tableau complaint.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a cold read of the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6117 makes clear who knows Bea is alive, which adult has responsibility for the night, and what concrete return or pickup plan exists; fail if the chapter still ends with only a vague "I'm safe" message and no actionable guardian/contact arrangement.
findings.problem: The overnight shelter of a seventeen-year-old is treated as emotionally urgent but not logistically serious enough. Eszter wisely makes Bea send a safety text, but the chapter never establishes a verifiable adult handoff, location disclosure, or next-morning collection plan, even though the continuity sheet's world rules make clear that housing Bea overnight without guardian involvement carries reputational and legal risk. As written, this chapter leaves the crisis operationally unresolved and forces the next chapter to inherit a gap.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6117 and the surrounding negotiation through the sent message, add one concrete safeguard that lives entirely inside this chapter: for example, Bea names the supervising adult, speaks to a guardian live, or agrees to a specific morning pickup/handoff that Eszter can enforce. Keep Bea's anger and refusal of parental choreography, but make the risk-management legible on the page instead of implied offstage.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into asymmetry, embarrassment, appetite, and the material costs of intimacy. When an edge case appears, choose the version that preserves class pressure, erotic consequence, and bodily specificity rather than smoothing the scene into tasteful distance or soft-focus safety.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene naturally contains sexual awkwardness, bodily shame, class contempt, grief, or moral compromise, vague tasteful phrasing counts as a failed draft and must be rewritten toward concrete consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken English here; uncontracted forms should appear mainly for precision, social performance, or emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary chapter feel through scene count, dialogue density, movement versus waiting, and whether the turn comes from confrontation, discovery, aftermath, preparation, or unwanted intrusion. A nocturnal chauffeur chapter should not be followed by another chapter with the same pulse and architecture; counter hard chapters with domestic or reflective ones that still advance consequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken but exact, materially grounded, and alert to social register; imagery should emerge from labor, appetite, weather, and bodily memory rather than from decorative abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person anchored to Beni, with memory pressure and sensory bleed but no roaming omniscience.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed, road-tight paragraphs with slower observational passages that let smell, touch, and silence accumulate; keep sentence music controlled rather than showy.
